texto: The ability to laugh at life is right at the top with love and communication in the hierarchy of our needs. Humour has much to do with pain it exaggerates the anxieties and absurdities we feel so that we gain distance and through laughter relief.
explicacao: Citação de Sara Davidson sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The ability to laugh at life is right at the top with love and communication in the hierarchy of …” articula humor, humour, humorists em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como humorists.
